name: n8n-mcp
description: MCP server providing AI assistants with comprehensive access to n8n node documentation and workflow management capabilities

n8n_api_url.title: n8n Instance URL
n8n_api_url.description: URL of your n8n instance (e.g., https://your-n8n.com or http://localhost:5678). Leave empty for documentation-only mode.

n8n_api_key.title: n8n API Key
n8n_api_key.description: API key from your n8n instance Settings > API. Required for workflow management features.

n8n_mcp_telemetry_disabled.title: Disable Telemetry
n8n_mcp_telemetry_disabled.description: Enable to turn off anonymous usage telemetry. Telemetry is on by default.

tools.name: tools_documentation
tools.description: Get documentation for n8n MCP tools.

tools.name: search_nodes
tools.description: Search n8n nodes by keyword with optional real-world examples.

tools.name: get_node
tools.description: Get node info with progressive detail levels and multiple modes.

tools.name: validate_node
tools.description: Validate n8n node configuration.

tools.name: get_template
tools.description: Get template by ID.

tools.name: search_templates
tools.description: Search templates with multiple modes.

tools.name: validate_workflow
tools.description: Full workflow validation: structure, connections, expressions, AI tools.

tools.name: n8n_create_workflow
tools.description: Create workflow.

tools.name: n8n_get_workflow
tools.description: Get workflow by ID with different detail levels.

tools.name: n8n_update_full_workflow
tools.description: Full workflow update.

tools.name: n8n_update_partial_workflow
tools.description: Update workflow incrementally with diff operations.

tools.name: n8n_delete_workflow
tools.description: Permanently delete a workflow.

tools.name: n8n_list_workflows
tools.description: List workflows (minimal metadata only).

tools.name: n8n_validate_workflow
tools.description: Validate workflow by ID.

tools.name: n8n_autofix_workflow
tools.description: Automatically fix common workflow validation errors.

tools.name: n8n_test_workflow
tools.description: Test/trigger workflow execution.

tools.name: n8n_executions
tools.description: Manage workflow executions: get details, list, or delete.

tools.name: n8n_health_check
tools.description: Check n8n instance health and API connectivity.

tools.name: n8n_workflow_versions
tools.description: Manage workflow version history, rollback, and cleanup.

tools.name: n8n_deploy_template
tools.description: Deploy a workflow template from n8n.io directly to your n8n instance.

tools.name: n8n_manage_datatable
tools.description: Manage n8n data tables and rows.

tools.name: n8n_manage_credentials
tools.description: Manage n8n credentials.

tools.name: n8n_audit_instance
tools.description: Security audit of n8n instance.
